style_presets.gba: Game Boy Advance style pixel art, limited palette, clean outline, side-facing idle pose
style_presets.nes: NES 8-bit style pixel art, 4-color per block palette, bold outlines, chunky pixels
style_presets.snes: Super Nintendo 16-bit style pixel art, richer palette, soft dithering allowed only at paletteSize >= 32
style_presets.modern-lowres: modern lowres pixel art, clean outline, subtle highlights, limited palette
style_presets.outline-heavy: pixel art with bold single-pixel black outline, flat interior color blocks

positive_prompt_suffix: crisp pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, uniform pixel grid, limited palette, transparent background
negative_prompt: blurry, smooth shading, anti-aliased, soft gradient, photorealistic, jpeg artifacts, 3D render

style_guardian.note: Register palette.png under Style Guardian so every sprite in the same game shares a unified palette.
